title: chamaeraphis latiglumis
intro: Chamaeraphis latiglumis, also known as the "Rabbit's foot fern," is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chamaeraphis latiglumis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
